bead.title: reasoning introspection: expose alias maps and emitted intent telemetry
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-e80c156e and fizeau-144bd2f9 found that ds4/llama props adapters parse rich L1 data, but runtime only merges ThinkingFormat. Alias maps, effective levels, supported params, and server-side reasoning_format are not exposed in ProtocolCapabilities or consumed by the translator. ADR-010 also requires honest telemetry for reasoning intent versus emitted wire form.

In scope:
- ProtocolCapabilities or equivalent carrier for reasoning aliases/effective levels/supported params/server-side format
- translator use of ds4 alias map so low/medium collapse is recorded honestly
- report/session telemetry fields for reasoning_intent and reasoning_emitted or equivalent
- tests for ds4 alias canonicalization and telemetry

Out of scope:
- OR-Qwen catalog wire form regression; separate reopened bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test ./internal/provider/ds4/... ./internal/provider/llamaserver/... ./internal/provider/registry/... -run "Alias|Effective|Supported|Reasoning" -count=1 passes.
2. go test ./internal/provider/openai/... ./internal/reasoning/... -run "Intent|Emitted|Alias|Effort" -count=1 passes and proves ds4 reasoning low is emitted or recorded as high according to the alias map.
3. rg -n "reasoning_intent|reasoning_emitted" --glob "*.go" shows production telemetry/report/session fields, and tests assert they are populated.
4. go test ./... -count=1 passes.

governing.title: ADR-010: Reasoning Wire Form Belongs in the Model Catalog
